meta.label: Board Game
meta.name: Sequence
meta.short_description: Choose wisely to get 5 chips in a row. Play defense to slow your opponents down.

boardgamehonor.name: 2003 Japan Boardgame Prize Best Japanese Game Nominee

boardgameversion.name: Jax English/Spanish edition 2005 with bonus game

boardgamefamily.name: Versions & Editions: Bigger Versions of Regular-Size Games
Versions & Editions: Travel Versions of Non-Travel Games

meta.description:
Sequence is a board and card game. The board shows all the cards (except for the Jacks) of two (2) standard 52-card decks, laid in a 10 x 10 pattern. The four corners are free spaces and count for all players equally.

The players compete to create rows, columns or diagonals of 5 connected checkers placed on the cards that the player has laid down. Two-eyed Jacks are wild, while one-eyed Jacks allow an opponent's checker to be removed. The game ends when someone has reached a specified number of connections.
meta.wiki:
Components:
  • Game Board
  • 104 Sequence Cards (2 x Standard Deck of Cards)
  • 4 unused Jokers are included (so 108 cards in total)
  • 50 Green Marker Chips
  • 50 Blue Marker Chips
  • 35 Red Marker Chips
  • Game Instructions
Microbadge
  • Sequence Fan
  • Sequence Fan
